What You Get

Every detail,
considered.

Nothing here by accident.

01
Suede PU Leather Shell
Soft-touch exterior that mirrors premium automotive trim — looks and feels factory-fitted.
02
Signature Accent Stripe
Color-matched stripe runs the full length — looks intentional, never aftermarket.
03
Wedge-Lock Fit System
Tapered body grips with its own weight — no straps, clips, adhesives, or rattles.
04
Multi-Pocket Interior
Phone, cards, coins, and a deep utility well — everything within arm's reach.
05
5 Premium Colorways
Black, Tan, Brown, Forest Green, Burgundy Red — match your interior or make it yours.
